feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: A/P Invoice Copied From Goods Receipt PO With Landed Cost Cannot Be Canceled
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I know this is a behavior of the system. But I cannot answer which are these inconsistencies here. Please help me to explain more details. 
Thank you so much.

entry.title: Thai Characters Font
entry.content:
Hi All

Which is the most suitable font for Thai characters to export properly from Crystal Report Design to PDF?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Inventory Posting List Default Posting Dates Range
entry.content:
Hi All
Is it possible to change Default Posting Dates Range in Inventory Posting List from Item Master Data?

We are able to define Posting Dates Range in Inventory Reports->Inventory Posting List to save most recent Dates Range in Selection Criteria.

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Retrieving Data from SAP Business One using Node.js Middleware
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have recently started a project that aims to retrieve data from SAP business one and manipulate it using a nodejs middleware but I didn't find too much ressources to implement the middleware.

I started by learning small things about the SAP Business One platform and learned the basics of nodejs.

I wanna know if there is any resources or methods to build the middleware.

Any help please

entry.title: Bloqueio de inserção em Subtipo de problemas (OPST) - Chamado de Serviço.
entry.content:
Olá,

Precisava travar a inserção dos usuários de novos "Subtipos de Problemas" da tela de chamado de serviços, tabela OPST.

A mesma não contem um "Objtype", para se travar através da TN, e não encontrei como bloquear a inserção de dados através da tela de "Autorizações gerais" do Core do SAP.

Alguém já teve esse mesmo problema e conseguiu contornar e solucionar o mesmo?

Obrigado.

Atenciosamente,
Vinicius Dezan.

entry.title: GST Tax Rate Decimals
entry.content:
Hi All

How is it possible to increase Tax Rate Decimals?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: SAP B1 - Error in mutual linking. [Resources - Linked Item]
entry.content:
Hello,

We get the following error when updating our items linked to the source master data. Can you help me?

"Error in mutual linking. [Resources - Linked Item]"

entry.title: MySQL 8.0 CMS DB with SSL Certificate (Linux)
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to install SAP BO 4.3 on Linux (RHEL 9) with a MySQL 8.0 DB which requieres SSL Certificates. With the mysqlclient iam able to connect to the Database using a Config File at /etc/my.cnf

When iam trying to install SAP BO then iam getting this Error:

Error
An error has occurred.

SAP BusinessObjects BI platform CMS: Unable to connect to the CMS system database ""sap-bo-dev-repo:11.22.33.44:3306"". Reason: Access denied
for user 'bo-dev-repo-user'@'11.22.33.44' (using password: YES) (FWB 00090)

The system cannot verify the database logon information.
Would you like to correct it?

Does anybody know if SAP BO is using the mysqlclient? If yes where i can set a Config File to set the SSL Certificates?

entry.title: How to Choose the Control Account When Creating Journal Entries by Using Import from Excel feature?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Is it possible to select the control account we are posting when using Import from Excel? We currently use DTW in order to achieve this, but some users are struggling to handle DTW and its technical approach, so importing from Excel seems more adequate and user-friendly, let's say.

I have tried couple different Excel templates but none of them are getting the desired outcome. The result is always booking the GL set up in the Business Partner, but sometimes we have to book a different one and this process doesn't seem to offer this possibility, unless we are missing something here.

Any thoughts?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP B1 DI-API Set Price list Programmatically for Purchase Request
entry.content:
Hello,

How can i set the default price list for Purchase Request Documents, either through the DI-API or through settings?

 

This price list is always selected as default and i wish to change that:

 

Thank you

entry.title: Retrieving Data from SAP Business One using Node.js Middleware
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have recently started a project that aims to retrieve data from SAP business one and manipulate it using a nodejs middleware but I didn't find too much ressources to implement the middleware. I started by learning small things about the SAP Business One platform and learned the basics of nodejs. I wanna know if there is any resources or methods to build the middleware.

Any help please 😥

entry.title: Error in Trigger
entry.content:
Hello community,
This request is a trigger which was created on the [@SUIVI_COLIS] table. The trigger is fired when there is an update on the table.

In this case, the trigger checks if certain fields (U_Date, U_Quart, U_Colis, U_PO, U_PRI, U_VM, U_Grade, U_PB, U_N_Odre_Prod, U_Lot, U_ML, U_Dirt, U_Ash, U_Nitro, U_Grade_F and U_CHEQ) have been updated and if the status is "C". If these conditions are met, an error is returned and the transaction is rolled back, meaning the changes will not be made.

This is a security measure to prevent certain fields from being modified when the status is "C". Does this answer your question

But it doesn't turn out as expected.
it is triggered each time an update is carried out regardless of the status of the line.

Please help me resolve this issue.

ALTER TRIGGER [dbo].[BloquerModification_SUIVI_COLIS]
ON [dbo].[@SUIVI_COLIS]
FOR UPDATE
AS
BEGIN
    IF UPDATE(U_Date) OR UPDATE(U_Quart) OR UPDATE(U_Colis) OR UPDATE(U_PO) OR UPDATE(U_PRI) 
   OR UPDATE(U_VM) OR UPDATE(U_Grade) OR UPDATE(U_PB) OR UPDATE(U_N_Odre_Prod) OR UPDATE(U_Lot) 
   OR UPDATE(U_ML) OR UPDATE(U_Dirt) OR UPDATE(U_Ash) OR UPDATE(U_Nitro) OR UPDATE(U_Grade_F) OR UPDATE(U_CHEQ) 
   AND EXISTS  (SELECT 1 FROM inserted WHERE Status = 'C' AND [DocEntry] = inserted.[DocEntry])
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR('La modification des champs U_Date, U_Quart, U_Colis, U_PO, U_PRI, U_VM, U_Grade, U_PB, U_N_Odre_Prod, U_Lot, U_ML, U_Dirt, U_Ash, U_Nitro, U_Grade_F et U_CHEQ est interdite lorsque le statut est "C".', 16, 1)
        ROLLBACK TRANSACTION
    END
END

entry.title: [SAP B1] License and Authorization Concern
entry.content:
We have professional and limited licenses (CRM, Financials and Logistics). Now, in some situations, we need to temporarily allow a certain user to access (read & write) a module outside the scope of his/her license type. For example, a user with "limited financials license" needs to access modules only accessible when using a "limited CRM license".

My idea is to give the user authorization to the necessary modules and also lend that user a professional license. Will this work without any issues? Will the already set authorizations get reset after I give the user a license type different from the one he/she normally uses? By the time I need to revoke the temporary access for those modules, I only need to change his/her license type back to limited, and those modules will be inaccessible even if I leave the authorization as is. And when the user needs to access those modules again, I only need to lend her a professional license. Is my understanding correct?

entry.title: Rounding Up in PLD in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Sap Experts

I am using SAP Business One with SQL db, V 9.3 P13. 

In our business we ship closed cartons and we use the PLD for the order. 

So for example when a carton has the incomplete quantity, the carton value comes in decimals which is normal.  I currently use ROUND()... But I want to round up like in MS Excel.

For example:

We use the round function, so right now it displays

0.23 = 0

0.49 = 0

0.5 = 1

1.2 = 1

1.6 = 2

I would like to modify the formula and use the round up function in excel so the values would appear like this:

0.23 = 1

0.49 = 1

0.5 = 1

1.2 = 2

1.6 = 2

entry.title: Hi How to make check number mandatory field RCT1.checkNumber
entry.content:
Dear Sir 

Kindly Help Me , How to make cheknumber field mandatory in incoming payment receipt fiield. 

check number field should not have single digit

entry.title: Displaying Type 'Text' in Crystal Report for Sap Business One
entry.content:
Hello Community,
I want to display the Text Type in reports.
but I can not.
what method should I use to do this, or function?
thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: syntax query
entry.content: Hello i will try to explain my doubt, im looking for the source of the corect syntax in both places but they work diferent, example in query manager i can make a formated serch but the syntax is diferent in the other area where i make post transaction notifiction so the sql functions and syntax is based in witch sql version i want to practice for manual construction ty all

entry.title: How to query for bin location/warehouse history for item?
entry.content:
Warehoues in SAP Business One either use bin locations or not. I need to know the stock history for a specific item in a specific bin. I'm interested when stock for item in that specific bin was at f.e. 1x item A1 in location WH1.L1 at which document caused/resulted in that stock amout.

Same for the case that the item is in a warehouse that is not organized by stock locations.

I use the following tables to calculate the stock amount at a specific inventory log message.

Case bin locations enabled:

  1. OIVL - Warehouse Journal (InQty, OutQty)
  2. OWHS - Warehouses
  3. OBTL - Bin Transaction log
  4. OBIN - Bin Locations

Case bin locations disabled:

  1. OIVL - Warehouse Journal (InQty, OutQty)
  2. OWHS - Warehouses

As far as i can see this catches all inventory transactions besides a stock transfer inside a single warehouse (OIVL stays untouched). That is my problem here. Is there an easy way to sum up stock amount (InQty/OutQty) per item/per bin location/at transaction? Now i would ressort to using OILM and check the OILM-ActionType and tables OIVL and OBTL in addition.

Thanks for any hint.

entry.title: I want to import 100 lines of GRPO in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to import to SAP my GRPOs. I can see the standard option of 'Electronic Document Import Wizard '. Can you please tell me how I shall go about it?

With Regards,

Samudra Gupta

entry.title: Event Sender Deploy Error B1if
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting following Error while setting Event Sender Setup. When I create purchase order it shows in SEVT table but does not display msg to integration framework in Event monitoring log.

 

Thank you in advance,
